sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_name TEXT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE events SET event_time = timezone('Europe/London', event_time) WHERE event_name = 'Meeting';
SELECT event_name, timezone('Australia/Sydney', event_time) AS local_event_time FROM events;
SELECT event_name, timezone('America/New_York', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 18:00:00') AS adjusted_time FROM events;
